Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulsmith]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — A Soulsmith is a role that involves creating magical items from madra and Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Soulsmithing involves the deconstruction and reconstruction of Remnants to utilize their unique properties.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — Soulsmiths are capable of controlling many constructs at once.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — A Soulsmith works in a foundry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Soulsmithing is a discipline that requires delicacy and skill to work with bindings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Soulsmiths are craftsmen who work with the stuff of spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Soulsmiths form constructs, steal bindings from Remnants to transplant into sacred artists, and forge weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The art of a Soulsmith requires a sharp memory and dedication to experimentation.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Goldsteel is often used for Soulsmith tools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Soulsmithing is the process of creating a construct by taking control of power and giving it form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Soulsmithing requires compatibility between the Soulsmith's power and the construct's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Soulsmith is a title or profession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Gesha uses Soulsmith practice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Reshaping madra besides one's own is the fundamental skill of a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Soulsmiths can do many things with a Sylvan Riverseed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — There is a Soulsmith’s underground storehouse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — A Soulsmith was in charge of the course’s operation.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — A Soulsmith is required to repair a cracked Ancestor's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Soulsmiths create constructs and weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — An impulsive Soulsmith is a dead Soulsmith.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Soulsmithing involves binding a spiritual construct to a physical vessel by using madra to tie them together.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — A Soulsmith is one who practices Soulsmithing.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama does not consider himself a Soulsmith.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Soulsmiths can sometimes blend bindings into hybrid techniques.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Malice is a famous Soulsmith.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
